title: VERITAS LUX MEA
text:
Philosophy Within Me

知之爲知之 不知爲不知 是知也 To know what you know, and to know what you don’t know, that is true knowledge.
— Confucius (The Analects 2.17)



You are the light of the world.
— Jesus Christ (Matthew 5:14)



배워서 남 주자! Use what you learn to help others.
— Korean Proverb (Modified)



Central Limit Theorem
\[\sqrt{n}(\bar{X}_n - \mu) \xrightarrow{d} N(0,\sigma^2)\] Can you guess what I mean by the CLT?
